math_recheck: Numerically verified spin-orbital (1/4)|<ij||ab>|^2 form == closed-shell (ia|jb)[2(ia|jb)-(ib|ja)] form on both HeH+/STO-3G data (-0.0064020 Ha, matches claimed -0.00640) and random multi-orbital 8-fold-symmetric ERIs; ran the production einsum mp2_closed_shell against an explicit AO->MO sum (match); confirmed SS=(ia|jb)[(ia|jb)-(ib|ja)], OS=(ia|jb)^2 decomposition and the swapaxes(1,3)=(ib|ja) exchange; grounded H0=SumF(p), V (Eq4), E0 (Eq3), E1=-1/2 Sum<ij||ij> (Eq5), E(HF)=E(MP1) (Eq7), E2 (Eqs8-10), and O(M^5) 4-quarter transform against the Cremer WIREs review (faithful secondary; primary 1934 paper paywalled).
fixes: reasoning.md:68,92,113,120,138,140 renamed posterior method-name 'MP2'/'mp2_*' in the final-code comments and function names to in-frame descriptive terms (second_order_spin_orbital, second_order_closed_shell, 'second-order correlation energy') so the discovery monologue never names the method after its (target) authors; re-ran the renamed spin-orbital routine -> still -0.0064020 Ha
caveat: Primary source Phys. Rev. 46, 618 (1934) is paywalled (refs/mp1934_aps.pdf is the 5.5KB login wall, not the paper); all load-bearing equations verified against the Cremer WIREs review (refs/mp_review_smu.pdf) which reproduces the original MP operator/E0/E1/E2 with equation numbers, plus independent numerical re-derivation.
